name: law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: manual invoice reconciliation is time-consuming and error-prone.
